articles.title: Alliance of Sahel States confirms joint airstrikes in Mali - africanews.com
articles.description: The joint anti-jihadist force of Niger, Burkina Faso and Mali carried out "intense air campaigns" in Malian territory following attacks by Al-Qaeda-linked jihadists and Tuareg separatists, the government of Niger said late Thursday.
